---
title: "408_Project"
author: Sydney Mylan & Corina Amundson
format: html
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(GGally)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(maps)
library(usmap)
```

```{r}
arch_records <- read.csv("~/Downloads/408/Final Project/408-Project-Arch-Data/new.csv")

names(arch_records)

arch_records <- arch_records |>
rename(state = `State.Prov.Sea`)
```

```{r}
ggplot(arch_records, aes(x = `Class.4`)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = `Class.4`)) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r}
ggplot(arch_records, aes(x = Class.2)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = Class.4))
```

```{r}
ggplot(arch_records, aes(x = `Class.2`, y = Quantity)) +
geom_point(aes(color = `Class.4`))
```

```{r}
plot_usmap(color = "white", data = arch_records, values = "state") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```
